converged.action: Request Stripe or payment-processor trailing-3-month revenue export before treating $18k MRR or 40% MoM growth as load-bearing.

Request product analytics export defining active installation (install vs. active-weekly-user, including self-hosted and off-registry deployments) and cross-walk to public registry lifetime downloads.
Treat deck-claimed installation scale and revenue as uncorroborated until reconciliation; the registry–deck install gap is a serious credibility flag, not a rounding error.

Accept that Ferrite ships a real devtools artifact with independently verified technical credibility (commit cadence, hackathon validation, launch-thread production users); mechanism coherence survives independent scrutiny.

residual.fork: Fast-check instrument semantics: whether verified execution plus modest commercial proof suffices to write the $100K check now, or uncorroborated load-bearing deck claims require reconciled payer thresholds before any capital.
residual.bull_position: Above a zero-revenue/zero-deployment floor—modest MRR, registry-scale actives, one design-partner-confirmed agent-CI deployment, sustained ship cadence—the $100K is correctly priced as execution conviction; the check buys standardized reconciliation rather than requiring bear-floor metrics ex ante (Turns 7, 10, 12).
residual.bear_position: Load-bearing subject-sourced commercial claims combined with registry contradiction fail a pre-capital integrity test; write only after reconciled figures reach ~$12k MRR, two named paying accounts, and an auditable active-install definition surviving registry cross-walk—weekly releases prove build capacity, not procurement (Turns 8, 11, 13).

instrument.for_fork: Fast-check instrument semantics: whether verified execution plus modest commercial proof suffices to write the $100K check now, or uncorroborated load-bearing deck claims require reconciled payer thresholds before any capital.
instrument.move: Run a single pre-decision diligence bundle—Stripe trailing-3-month export with MoM cohorts, product analytics active-install cross-walk (including off-registry/self-hosted), and one design-partner reference call attesting production agent-CI use with cache-hit or cost improvement—then apply a bifurcated gate: (A) if ≥~$12k MRR, ≥2 named paying accounts, and auditable install definition reconciled to registry plus documented off-registry gap, both poles authorize write; (B) if below bear floor but above bull floor (any modest revenue or one confirmed production deployment, benchmark holds at early scale), investor explicitly chooses thesis posture (execution-option vs. commercial-integrity gate); (C) if effectively zero revenue and no partner attestation of deployed use, pass.

authority_note: This adjudication is agent-derived: it records what the forum settled and what survived it for the investor to argue with. It does not pick a winner, authorize a check, or settle its own case.
